violations.text: Establishment's Rhode Island Manager Certified In Food Safety license is expired. FMC must re-instate and/or other full-time equivalent staff to register. Application provided during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2025

Doors to the outside are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2025

The cutting boards on the makeline prep unit are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2025

The following were observed in poor repair: 1. gaskets for lowboy coolers at makeline 2. side of ice machine Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of soil residue: 1. shelving in walk-in cooler 2. ice machine (interior sides) New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025
The coving baseboard and walls in the women's restroom were observed in poor repair. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2025
